name: The Hunger Games
description:
A Hunger Games RPG!

I noticed we didn't have very many actual RPGs for the Hunger Games, just characters, so I made this!

You're a tribute from District One, the shining metropolis of Panem. The one thing even worse than the fact that you've essentially been selected to die? Your lifelong crush has been chosen as the other Tribute.

(You can choose whether or not you've been training for this, but your parents are thrilled either way.) You will have to write your character; gender, physical description, any sort of backstory if you want to be specific, etc.

Kill who you want, how you want! Take down the Capitol and overrun the government for all I care! Make out with a Hunger Games character if you're really that devoted to one of those random side character tributes that everyone seems to find attractive for some reasons that continue to elude me! Become the bird-whispering ruler of the Mockingjays! Sow chaos or play as a specific Hunger Games character!
Have fun with this world, and may the odds be ever in your favor.

(I'm really sorry if the bot speaks for you, but I can't control it! Just delete the message if it starts talking for you.)
creator: lazarus.is.dead.
